Fine Oleander
Quest Item
This item can be used in tradeskills.
Required level of 70.
WT: 0.2 Size: SMALL
Class: ROG
Race: ALL

Item Lore:Plant Poison
Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:1000

Tribute:7

Expansion: Seeds of Destruction
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 70
[Drops | Recipes | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Blackburrow: Reinforced Blackburrow (Level 80 - Hardcore HH)
NPC Name
a scrawny gnoll - Blackburrow - HH

an Obliteration agent
an Obliteration infiltrator

a minotaur weaponsmaster

a shadowmane rogue

NPC Name
Sir Gregon Sulltor

NPC Name
a rabid bat - Freeport Sewers

a Frostbite warrior

NPC Name
a desiccated treeling

NPC Name
a Royal Protector

NPC Name
a hraquis hunter

a Stormscape skyknight

Tiv Prayer Chanter

Yxtta, Pulpit of Exiles

a bereaved scribe
a cornered animist
a malicious trusik

Also drops in Dragonscale Hills from some of the plant mobs. These are for level 70 rogue poisons - oleander makes poisons that do slow procs.

Sage
1,308 posts
A frostbite warrior, Icefall glacier. Actually drops off all the "frostbite XXS" mobs saw 2 in 10 kills or so. Was light blue to me - lev 75, so I got bored with 'em kind of fast..
